data.body: SC8 CRITERION REVISION (user decision 2026-04-08): The 'real open-source codebase fixture (cloned from a public repo)' requirement is revised to accept a synthetic fixture representative of the target stack structure. The synthetic fixture at tests/integration/fixtures/python-project/ meets all substantive requirements: 22 add() callers across 8 source files, own test suite (tests/test_callers.py) that validates semantic correctness post-transform. The 'real open-source' mechanism was the proposed means to achieve representativeness — not the goal itself. The synthetic fixture satisfies the intent of SC8.
